title: centaurea dubjanskyi
intro: Centaurea dubjanskyi, also known as Chaste Tree, is a perennial plant native to Central Asia, characterized by its fragrant blue flowers and unique medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat menstrual and menopausal symptoms, such as irregular periods and hot flashes, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Centaurea dubjanskyi include its ability to regulate hormone balances, alleviate anxiety and insomnia, and support overall female reproductive health. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support female health and well-being.
